title: OpenAI's AI speaker marks its entry into consumer hardware
summary: Yahoo Finance Tech Editor discusses OpenAI's (OPAI.PVT) first consumer hardware device, an AI-powered smart speaker, breaking down what the product could offer and what it means for the company's push into consumer hardware and the broader AI race.

title: Megacap Tech Lifts U.S. Stocks
summary: U.S. stocks edged higher Wednesday as gains in megacap technology names offset weakness in chip stocks.  PayPal  surged on reports of a takeover offer and another round of strong bank earnings kept Wall Street in an upbeat mood.  The S&P 500 added 28.81 points, or 0.38%, to 7572.40, while the Nasdaq Composite gained 162.22 points, or 0.62%, to 26269.23.

title: Apple Is Up 20% in 2026. What Will It Take for AAPL Stock to Hit $350?
